targets.query:
from(bucket: "stormos")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "messages" and r.direction == "sent")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: count)
  |> group(columns: ["transport"])

from(bucket: "stormos")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "messages")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: count)
  |> group(columns: ["transport"])

from(bucket: "stormos")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "messages" and r.direction == "sent")
  |> group(columns: ["transport"])
  |> count()
  |> group()

from(bucket: "stormos")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "messages" and r.direction == "received")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: count)
  |> group(columns: ["transport"])

from(bucket: "stormos")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "messages")
  |> group(columns: ["city"])
  |> count()
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["_value"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 10)

from(bucket: "stormos")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "messages")
  |> group(columns: ["country"])
  |> count()
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["_value"], desc: true)

from(bucket: "stormos")
  |> range(start: -30d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "messages")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1w, fn: count)
  |> group(columns: ["transport"])
